summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of IdeaForge Innovation Platform. Found critical authentication integration issues blocking access to core application features. Backend APIs work but AI generation endpoints timeout. Landing page UI loads correctly but protected routes require working authentication.

critical_bugs.issue: Request timeout after 30 seconds during AI generation
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents testing of landing page AI generation, but template fallback should work

critical_bugs.issue: Request timeout after 30 seconds during AI analysis generation
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents testing of analysis AI generation, but mock data fallback should work

critical_bugs.issue: Registration form submits successfully (200 response) but does not redirect user or store authentication state
critical_bugs.impact: Completely blocks access to all protected application features

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication state not properly maintained - user gets redirected to login even after successful registration

ui_bugs.issue: Registration form fields not consistently detectable with standard selectors
Mobile and tablet viewport layouts have issues with element visibility

integration_issues.issue: Frontend receives 200 response from /api/auth/register but fails to handle authentication state properly
Cannot test core features (project creation wizard, landing page builder, analysis page) due to authentication barrier

untested_features.reason: Authentication required - briefly accessed but immediately redirected
untested_features.impact: Cannot verify wizard flow, form validation, or step navigation

untested_features.feature: Landing Page Builder with Template Fallback
untested_features.impact: Cannot test AI vs template generation, preview modes, or download functionality

untested_features.feature: Analysis Page with A/B/C Financial Scenarios
untested_features.impact: Cannot test mock data fallback, scenario switching, or regional/global toggle

untested_features.feature: Project Detail Page with Workflow Progress
untested_features.impact: Cannot test workflow progress indicator or business services tab

passed_tests: Frontend loads correctly with proper IdeaForge branding
Marketing features displayed: AI Agent Swarm Technology, Auto-Generated Business Documents, Instant Landing Page Builder
Navigation between login and registration pages works
Form submit buttons are present and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication integration. Backend APIs work (registration returns 200) but frontend doesn't store/handle auth state properly. This blocks testing of ALL core application features including project wizard, landing page builder, analysis page, and workflow progress. Need to fix token storage, authentication state management, and route protection before features can be properly tested.

success_percentage.frontend: 25% (UI loads correctly but auth integration broken, cannot access core features)
